Design System

Figma Libraries

Access the official Voyadores Figma design files. You'll need a Figma account and the appropriate team permissions to view and edit.

Design System

Voyadores Design System

Core UI components, design tokens, color styles, and typography — the single Figma source of truth for all Voyadores products.

Open in Figma
Marketing

Voyadores Social Media

Templates and assets for social media posts, banners, and branded content across all Voyadores platforms.

Open in Figma
Helpsite

Voyadores Helpsite

Design files for the Voyadores help center and support documentation site.

Open in Figma

Access & Permissions

Figma Account Required

You must have a Figma account to view these files. Sign up at figma.com if you don't have one.

Team Permissions

Editing rights are limited to the design team. Request access from your team lead or the design system owner.

Always Use the Latest Version

Do not duplicate files into your personal drafts for production work. Always reference the shared team files to stay in sync.

On this page
